title: 4. Take two straight wires of the same length and fix them in such way that they are perpendicular to   x -axis at the points A and B and meeting the curve
subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: 4. Take two straight wires of the same length and fix them in such way that they are perpendicular to   x -axis at the points A and B and meeting the curve
objective:
To verify Lagrange’s Mean Value
Theorem.
A piece of plywood, wires, white
paper, sketch pens, wires.
procedure:
1. Take a piece of plywood and paste a white paper on it.
2. Take two wires of convenient size and fix them on the white paper pasted on
the plywood to represent   x -axis and   y -axis (see Fig. 12).
3. Take a piece of wire of about 10 cm length and bend it in the shape of a
curve as shown in the figure. Fix this curved wire on the white paper pasted
on the plywood.
discussion: This theorem may be used to find the roots of an equation.
